name: Confetti Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine the Golden Crisco shortening, brown sugar, milk, and vanilla. Mix at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Beat in the egg.
3. In another bowl, combine the flour, salt, and baking soda. Add this to the creamed mixture in the first bowl at a low speed until blended.
4. Stir in the walnuts, chocolate chunks, white chocolate chips, and milk chocolate chips. Using a 2-tablespoon (30 mL) measuring scoop, drop the dough onto an ungreased baking sheet, placing them about 3-inches (7.5 cm) apart.
5. Bake for 8-9 minutes at 375°F (190°C), until the cookies appear moist. Allow to cool for 2 minutes on the baking sheet. Do not overbake; the cookies will continue to bake during the cooling time. Transfer to a cooling rack. Makes: 2 dozen 3-inch (7.5 cm) cookies
